tool_args.label: Top five customer priorities
tool_args.raw_text: The top five service attributes that will improve customer satisfaction and encourage customers to ride more frequently: 1 Faster, Frequent Service 2 Cleaner Stations and Vehicles 3 Safer Environment 4 Better Weekend Service 5 Enhanced Communications

payload.claim_text: The top five service attributes that will improve customer satisfaction and encourage customers to ride more frequently: 1 Faster, Frequent Service 2 Cleaner Stations and Vehicles 3 Safer Environment 4 Better Weekend Service 5 Enhanced Communications

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1 Faster, Frequent Service 2 Cleaner Stations and Vehicles 3 Safer Environment 4 Better Weekend Service 5 Enhanced Communications

tool_args.label: Survey methodology change Fall 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Fall 2021 marked the switch from quarterly to biannual survey

payload.claim_text: Fall 2021 marked the switch from quarterly to biannual survey

evidence_refs.source_quote: *Fall 2021 marked the switch from quarterly to biannual survey

tool_args.label: Faster Service initiatives
tool_args.raw_text: 1 Faster Service. Initiatives underway: Hiring frontline employees, SubStat, BusStat, ParaStat, SPEED team, Expand ABLE, Bus network redesigns, Increase employee availability. Next up: Scale predictive maintenance, 150 miles of new bus lanes, E-hail improvements

payload.claim_text: Faster Service initiatives underway include hiring frontline employees, SubStat/BusStat/ParaStat, SPEED team, Expand ABLE, Bus network redesigns, Increase employee availability. Next up: scale predictive maintenance, 150 miles of new bus lanes, E-hail improvements
payload.subject: Faster Service

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Hiring frontline employees • SubStat, BusStat, ParaStat • SPEED team • Expand ABLE • Bus network redesigns • Increase employee availability
• Scale predictive maintenance • 150 miles of new bus lanes • E-hail improvements

tool_args.label: Cleaner Stations & Vehicles initiatives
tool_args.raw_text: 2 Cleaner Stations & Vehicles. Initiatives underway: Station Refresh 'Mop My Stop', Enhanced routine cleaning, Higher standards of cleanliness, Training to new standards, More frequent bus deep cleanings. Next up: 50+ 'Mop My Stops' in 2023, Phased re-opening of bathrooms starting early 2023, Reinstitute specialty Clean Teams

payload.claim_text: Cleaner Stations & Vehicles initiatives: Station Refresh 'Mop My Stop', enhanced routine cleaning, higher cleanliness standards, training, more frequent bus deep cleanings. Next: 50+ Mop My Stops in 2023, phased bathroom re-opening early 2023, reinstitute Clean Teams
payload.subject: Cleaner Stations & Vehicles

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Station Refresh: " Mop My Stop " • Enhanced routine cleaning – Higher standards of cleanliness – Training to new standards • More frequent bus deep cleanings
• 50+ "Mop My Stops" in 2023 • Phased re-opening of bathrooms starting early 2023 • Reinstitute specialty Clean Teams

tool_args.label: Safer Environment initiatives
tool_args.raw_text: 3 Safer Environment. Initiatives underway: On-board subway cameras, Guards posted at select subway stations, Additional NYPD Officers, On-board train security announcements, End of line outreach, Tactile warning edges systemwide. Next up: Cameras on-board all subway cars, MTA PD deployed to select subway stations, Increasing ban for eligible offenses & conditions, Brighter subway cars & stations

payload.claim_text: Safer Environment initiatives: on-board subway cameras, guards at select stations, additional NYPD officers, security announcements, end of line outreach, tactile warning edges. Next: cameras on all subway cars, MTA PD at select stations, increasing ban for eligible offenses, brighter cars & stations
payload.subject: Safer Environment

evidence_refs.source_quote: • On-board subway cameras • Guards posted at select subway stations • Additional NYPD Officers • On-board train security announcements • End of line outreach • Tactile warning edges systemwide
• Cameras on-board all subway cars • MTA PD deployed to select subway stations • Increasing ban for eligible offenses & conditions • Brighter subway cars & stations

tool_args.label: Better Weekend Service initiatives
tool_args.raw_text: 4 Better Weekend Service. Initiatives underway: Weekend service czar, Shuttle improvements, Service diversion maps. Next up: Optimize scheduling of weekend work, Evaluate schedules and ridership, Improve headways

payload.claim_text: Better Weekend Service initiatives: weekend service czar, shuttle improvements, service diversion maps. Next: optimize weekend work scheduling, evaluate schedules and ridership, improve headways
payload.subject: Better Weekend Service

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Weekend service czar • Shuttle improvements • Service diversion maps
• Optimize scheduling of weekend work • Evaluate schedules and ridership • Improve headways

tool_args.label: Enhanced Communications initiatives
tool_args.raw_text: 5 Enhanced Communications. Initiatives underway: Updating and streamlining MYmta, Expanded Wi-Fi in tunnels. Next up: Station agents of the future, Improve communications during major incidents, Better signage for accessible routes, Upgrade quality and content of public information in stations and on-board buses

payload.claim_text: Enhanced Communications initiatives: update/streamline MYmta, expand Wi-Fi in tunnels. Next: station agents of the future, improve communications during major incidents, better signage for accessible routes, upgrade public info in stations and on-board buses
payload.subject: Enhanced Communications

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Updating and streamlining MYmta • Expanded Wi-Fi in tunnels

• Station agents of the future • Improve communications during major incidents • Better signage for accessible routes • Upgrade quality and content of public information in stations and on-board buses

tool_args.label: Outcome-based service metrics
tool_args.raw_text: Outcome-based service metrics: Subway & Bus: % Service Delivered, Customer Journey Time Performance, Delays. Bus: Bus Speeds by Time of Day, Customer Journey Time Performance by Borough, Access to All-Day Frequent Bus Network. Paratransit: Trips by Type of Provider, On-Time Performance, Provider No-Shows

payload.claim_text: Outcome-based service metrics include % Service Delivered, Customer Journey Time Performance, Delays (Subway/Bus); Bus Speeds by Time of Day, Customer Journey Time Performance by Borough, Access to All-Day Frequent Bus Network (Bus); Trips by Type of Provider, On-Time Performance, Provider No-Shows (Paratransit)

evidence_refs.source_quote: • % Service Delivered • Customer Journey Time Performance, by Line • Delays
• % Service Delivered • Bus Speeds, by Time of Day • Customer Journey Time Performance, by Borough • Access to All-Day Frequent Bus Network
• Trips, by Type of Provider • On-Time Performance • Provider No-Shows

tool_args.label: Customer satisfaction survey topics
tool_args.raw_text: Customer satisfaction survey results: Wait time, Cleanliness, Announcements, Service reliability, Travel times, Staff helpfulness, Unexpected delays, Elevators & escalators, Wayfinding, Communications, Fare evasion, Personal safety & security, Homelessness & People behaving erratically

payload.claim_text: Customer satisfaction survey covers: wait time, cleanliness, announcements, service reliability, travel times, staff helpfulness, unexpected delays, elevators & escalators, wayfinding, communications, fare evasion, personal safety & security, homelessness & people behaving erratically

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Wait time • Cleanliness • Announcements • Service reliability • Travel times • Staff helpfulness • Unexpected delays • Elevators & escalators • Wayfinding • Communications • Fare evasion • Personal safety & security • Homelessness & People behaving erratically
